channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Book excerpt: "Torched" by Jonathan Vigliotti
item.description: In his new book, the CBS News correspondent writes of the warning posed by the inadequate response to last year's catastrophic wildfires that destroye...

item.title: Passengers start to disembark cruise ship stricken by hantavirus
item.description: A Dutch-flagged cruise ship that was hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak reached Spain's Canary Islands early Sunday morning.

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: Evacuations begin after MV Hondius arrives in Canary Islands
item.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: Atlanta Braves Hall of Fame manager Bobby Cox has died at 84
item.description: Cox managed Braves' teams that ruled National League and won 1995 World Series.
